jd_text:
About the Company

200 Health is redefining preventive healthcare through advanced blood testing, biological age analysis, and personalized health optimization. We translate complex biomarker data into clear insights and actionable recommendations across lifestyle, supplements, and advanced therapies. Our platform empowers individuals to understand how their body is functioning and make data-driven decisions to improve long-term health, performance, and longevity.

About the Role

We are seeking a Technical Product Director to lead product strategy, platform architecture direction, and execution across 200 Health’s core technology ecosystem. This is a senior leadership role responsible for defining and scaling a data-driven health platform, spanning biomarker ingestion, biological age modeling, insights generation, and personalized recommendations. You will lead product at a systems level—driving vision, structure, and execution across multiple product areas, while managing and mentoring product managers and working closely with engineering, data science, and clinical teams.

Responsibilities

 Product Vision & StrategyDefine and own the long-term product vision and roadmap for 200 HealthTranslate business goals into a scalable, multi-year platform strategyIdentify opportunities to expand:Health insightsPersonalization capabilitiesNew revenue streams (subscriptions, services, integrations)Align product direction with clinical credibility and commercial outcomes
 Platform & Technical LeadershipPartner with engineering leadership to define platform architecture and scalability strategyOversee development of:Data ingestion systems (labs, diagnostics, APIs)Health scoring & biological age modelsRecommendation engines (lifestyle, supplements, therapies)Ensure best practices in:Data privacy and securitySystem reliability and scalabilityIntegration frameworks
 Health Intelligence & Data ProductsLead the evolution of 200 Health’s core intelligence layer, including:Biomarker interpretation frameworksBiological age algorithmsPredictive and personalized insightsWork cross-functionally with clinical and data science teams to ensure:Scientific accuracyUser relevance and clarityDrive innovation in data-to-insight translation
 Product Organization LeadershipBuild, lead, and mentor a high-performing product teamEstablish product processes, rituals, and operating cadenceDrive a culture of:AccountabilityData-driven decision makingFast, high-quality execution

 User Experience & Product ExcellenceOversee end-to-end product experience:Test → Analyse → Insight → Act journeyEnsure the platform delivers:Clear, intuitive insightsHigh engagement and retentionActionable recommendations
 Commercial & Growth ImpactPartner with leadership on:Pricing strategyProduct-led growthMonetization modelsOptimize key metrics:Activation and engagementRetention and LTVConversion to treatments/services
 Partnerships & EcosystemDefine and scale integrations with:Labs and diagnostic providersClinics and treatment partnersBuild a platform ecosystem strategy (APIs, partnerships, data exchange)

Qualifications
Experience: 8–12+ years in product management, with significant technical depthProven experience leading complex, data-driven platformsExperience managing product teams and scaling product organizationsBackground in health tech, biotech, or data-heavy environments preferred

Required Skills
 Technical ExpertiseStrong understanding of:Data architecture, APIs, and distributed systemsAnalytics platforms and data pipelinesMachine learning / scoring systems (preferred)Ability to guide architectural decisions with engineering
 Domain Knowledge (Preferred)Familiarity with:Biomarkers, diagnostics, or longevity sciencePersonalized health or recommendation systemsAbility to bridge clinical concepts with product execution
 Leadership & MindsetStrategic thinker with strong execution capabilityComfortable operating at both high-level vision and deep product detailStrong communicator with cross-functional leadership ability
Requirements
Experience8–12+ years in product management, with significant technical depthProven experience leading complex, data-driven platformsExperience managing product teams and scaling product organizationsBackground in health tech, biotech, or data-heavy environments preferred
Technical ExpertiseStrong understanding of:Data architecture, APIs, and distributed systemsAnalytics platforms and data pipelinesMachine learning / scoring systems (preferred)Ability to guide architectural decisions with engineering
What Success Looks LikeA scalable, industry-leading health intelligence platformClear differentiation through biological age and personalizationStrong product-led growth and monetizationHigh-performing product and cross-functional teams
Why Join 200 HealthLead product at the forefront of health, longevity, and data scienceShape a category-defining platform with real-world impactBuild and scale a product organization from the ground up
